But scan failed, maybe because rule format must be "-w /etc/passwd -p wa -k audit_rules_usergroup_modification" exactly. The file might not be loaded because auditd not reloaded. Need to reload: systemctl restart auditd. Also could use auditctl -w /etc/passwd -p wa -k audit_rules_usergroup_modification? But we should not modify existing files if duplicates exist?
